Dog rescue for second chances

Giving dogs a fighting chance.

Underdog Heroes helps severely abused, neglected, and overlooked dogs heal, then finds the homes and people who can love them responsibly.

Donate See happy endings

Every dog deserves the chance to be seen for who they can become, not only what they survived.

Real stories

The dogs are the heroes.

Some stories begin in crisis. Some dogs are simply overlooked for being older, quieter, bigger, or ordinary. All of them deserve to be seen.

Adopted

Mercy

Mercy's story began in heartbreaking conditions, but it did not end there. With medical care, patience, and a safe home, she became more than what happened to her.

Read the story

Adopted

Rosa

Rosa needed steady medical care, patience, and someone willing to believe her story was not finished. Today she is a happy ending with a life beyond the injury.

Read the story

Adopted

Betty

Betty the mastiff needed patience, structure, and a home prepared for her size and needs. Her adoption shows how transparency helps dogs find the right people.

Read the story
Ways to help

It takes community.

01 Adopt Start with the dog in front of you, then we help decide whether the fit is right. 02 Foster Give a dog a calm place to land while they get ready for adoption. 03 Volunteer Help with walks, transport, care, events, photos, admin, or remote support. 04 Donate One-time and monthly gifts both matter. No amount is too small to help.

Monthly giving

$25 a month helps build steady rescue support.

One-time donations matter. Monthly donors make it easier to plan for food, vet care, medication, bedding, and the next dog who needs help.

Become a monthly donor
Most steady support Monthly donors
What people miss Small gifts add up
What donations cover Food, medicine, vet care, shelter, bedding

How a dog gets home

We move at the dog's pace.

  1. 01

    Rescue

    A dog comes from a shelter, a crisis, or a home where they need help getting safe.

  2. 02

    Care

    We learn who they are: health, behavior, fear, confidence, routine, and what support they need next.

  3. 03

    Match

    Applicants learn what the dog needs before anyone makes promises based only on a photo.

  4. 04

    Home

    The dog goes home when the match is right, and support continues after adoption.

Underdog Heroes

Dog rescue for abused, neglected, and overlooked dogs who deserve a fighting chance.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
